scenarios.description: tagSet with a non-null set of tags returns the Parser instance
scenarios.precondition: Parser instance created, non-empty Set<String> provided
scenarios.expectedResult: returns the same Parser instance with internal tag set updated
pseudocode: TEST TC01 tagSet updates internal tag set
assertEquals(tags, parser.settings().tagNames(), "internal tag names should match provided set");

scenarios.description: tagSet with an empty tag set disables all tag parsing
scenarios.precondition: Parser instance created, empty Set<String> provided
scenarios.expectedResult: returns Parser instance, internal tag set cleared
pseudocode: TEST TC02 tagSet with empty set clears tags

scenarios.description: tagSet with null argument throws NullPointerException
pseudocode: TEST TC03 tagSet with null throws NPE
